provider: International Academy of Digital Arts and Sciences
title: The Webby Awards
description: The Webby Awards is a juried creative award accepting eligible work from designers, makers, studios, writers, or digital creators administered by International Academy of Digital Arts and Sciences.
eligibility: Candidates must meet the current nomination or entry window, geography, age, work ownership, fee, and program-specific requirements.
value: Juried recognition, portfolio visibility, publication, and award-specific exhibition or networking benefits
